GENESIS workshop 2026 2026-06-24 1 Introduction This site contains course materials for Course materials for Biocondoctor Africa: GENESIS workshop on July 22 and 29, 2026. Data used is located in the github repository from which the site is built, as well as in the TOPMed analysis pipeline. Slides for lectures are linked below in the schedule. 1.1 Schedule Background material (not covered in workshop): GWAS crash course Wednesday, July 22 Introduction and Genomic Data Storage Intro to Genomic Data Storage (slides) Demo - GDS format in R Association tests GENESIS for association tests (slides) Demo: intro to association tests - Association tests in R Demo: aggregate tests Sliding window tests Wednesday, July 29 Population Structure and Relatedness R packages for PCA and relatedness (slides) Demo - Population structure and relatedness in R Mixed models Demo - Mixed models in R Variant annotation -Variant annotation (slides) Demo - Using variant annotation Download the workshop data and exercises: https://github.com/UW-GAC/GENESIS_workshop_2026/archive/main.zip 1.2 R packages used SeqArray SeqVarTools GENESIS SNPRelate TopmedPipeline tidyverse GGally 1.3 Resources If you are new to R, you might find the following material helpful: Introduction to R Graphics with ggplot2 tutorial Data manipulation with dplyr
